title: L&T Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: L&T Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
